Imager versions before 1.033 for Perl treat unsigned EXIF IFD entry counts as signed.

articles.title: CVE-2026-15041 — CVSS 3.7
articles.summary: A flaw was found in 389 Directory Server. The PBKDF2-SHA256 password verification function uses standard memcmp() for comparing password hashes instead of a constant-time comparison function. A remote attacker could potentially use timing measurements of LDAP bind attempts to infer partial hash information, though practical exploitation is extremely difficult due to PBKDF2 computational overhead.
